name: aggregate-audit-findings
purpose: Aggregates audit JSONL findings from multiple SoNash-specific audit directories into master issue lists (raw, normalized, dedup, unique, MASTER_ISSUE_LIST.jsonl+md, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md).
notes: ESM. Hardcodes SoNash-specific audit dir layout (docs/audits/single-session, docs/reviews/2026-Q1/canonical). Not portable as-is. Output written to docs/aggregation/.

name: analyze-learning-effectiveness
purpose: Measures Claude's learning effectiveness by analyzing AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md for pattern recurrence, automation gaps, and learning trends; produces dashboard and LEARNING_METRICS.md.
notes: CJS. Reads docs/AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md and docs/agent_docs/CODE_PATTERNS.md -- SoNash-specific review system. Also reads .claude/state/hook-warnings-log.jsonl. Exports calculateViolationsPerPr, calculateRecurrenceRate, calculateTrend for testing. Interactive mode for suggestion review.

name: append-hook-warning
purpose: Utility invoked by hooks and husky scripts to append structured warnings to .claude/hook-warnings.json and .claude/state/hook-warnings-log.jsonl with dedup, severity auto-escalation, and ack-state tracking.
notes: CJS. CRITICAL HUB: called by 8 unique caller files across .claude/hooks/ and .husky/. Implements cross-session dedup, severity escalation (5+ occurrences -> warning, 15+ -> error, pr-creep exempt), occurrences_since_ack tracking. State files: .claude/hook-warnings.json (cache view) and .claude/state/hook-warnings-ack.json. Load-bearing: removing breaks entire warning pipeline.

name: archive-doc
purpose: Archives a markdown document by adding YAML frontmatter, moving it to docs/archive/, updating cross-references in other docs, and optionally logging to ROADMAP_LOG.md.
notes: ESM. Uses gray-matter npm dependency. Hardcodes docs/archive/ and ROADMAP_LOG.md paths. Sanitize-then-portable: path constants and gray-matter dep must be adjusted. Extensive security hardening: symlink guard, path traversal prevention, cross-drive block (Windows), binary-file extension allowlist, UNC path block.

name: assign-review-tier
purpose: Assigns PR review tier (0-4) based on changed file paths and content escalation patterns; returns JSON with tier, reason, and escalation list.
notes: ESM. Entirely SoNash-specific: tier patterns reference SoNash product dirs (app/, components/, lib/firebase-config, functions/src/auth, firestore.rules, firebase.json, etc.). Escalation triggers check for XSS-risk props, code injection patterns, auth flow modification, and breaking change commits. Not portable as architecture classifier.

name: check-agent-compliance
purpose: Pre-commit check that verifies appropriate agents (code-reviewer, security-auditor) were used when code files are staged; non-blocking by default.
notes: ESM. Shells out to git (execSync). Patterns hardcoded to SoNash dirs (firestore.rules, middleware.ts, functions/src/). SECURITY_PATTERNS and agent names are sanitize points.

name: check-backlog-health
purpose: Checks MASTER_DEBT.jsonl for aging S1/S2 issues and threshold violations; exits non-zero on aging debt or threshold exceeded.
notes: ESM with createRequire (mixed). Reads docs/technical-debt/MASTER_DEBT.jsonl -- SoNash-specific path. Sanitize: BACKLOG_FILE path. Thresholds configurable via env vars. No shells_out.

name: check-cc
purpose: Pre-push cognitive complexity checker using acorn parser; computes CC per function on changed .js/.mjs files vs merge base, with baseline support.
notes: ESM with createRequire. No SoNash-specific paths. Implements SonarSource S3776 cognitive complexity spec. Dynamic acorn import. Baseline via docs/known-debt-baseline.json (configurable). Portable.

name: check-content-accuracy
purpose: Validates documentation content accuracy against the codebase: version numbers, file path existence, npm script references, code syntax.
notes: ESM. Shells out to git (log for file dates). Reads package.json for version checking. No hard SoNash-specific paths beyond docs/ conventions. Mostly portable.

name: check-cross-doc-deps
purpose: Blocking pre-commit check that enforces cross-document dependency rules: when a doc is modified, its declared dependents must also be staged.
notes: CJS. Shells out to git (execFileSync). Reads scripts/config/ and docs/DOCUMENT_DEPENDENCIES.md. Not portable: depends on SoNash doc dependency system and scripts/config/load-config.js (SoNash config loader). References scripts/lib/validate-skip-reason.js (not in JASON-OS). TTY-aware color output.

name: check-cyclomatic-cc
purpose: Pre-push cyclomatic complexity checker using ESLint's complexity rule on changed .js/.mjs files vs merge base, with baseline regression filtering.
notes: CJS. Resolves eslint binary directly (avoids npx/Windows .cmd issues). Reads known-debt-baseline.json (configurable path). No SoNash-specific content beyond eslint-plugin-sonash exclusion filter. Portable with minor adjustment.

name: check-doc-headers
purpose: Blocking pre-commit check that enforces required header fields (Document Version, Last Updated, Status) on new Tier 3+ markdown docs.
notes: CJS. Shells out to git for staged files. Tier 3+ threshold is SoNash convention. Depends on scripts/config/load-config.js and scripts/lib/validate-skip-reason.js. TTY-aware colors. Sanitize: tier definitions and config path.

name: check-doc-placement
purpose: Validates documentation files are in correct tier directories; flags archive candidates (completed plans, old session handoffs) and cleanup candidates (near-empty, old drafts).
notes: ESM. Shells out to git (log). Uses crypto for file hashing. Tier definitions and doc layout are SoNash conventions (docs/plans/, docs/archive/, docs/templates/). Sanitize: tier path config.

name: check-docs-light
purpose: Light documentation linter checking required sections by tier, Last Updated date freshness (<90d), version number format, cross-reference file existence, and internal anchor validity.
notes: ESM. No shells_out. Tier definitions are SoNash conventions. Core linting logic is portable; tier config must be adapted.

name: check-document-sync
purpose: Validates template-derived documents are synchronized with their templates, reading DOCUMENT_DEPENDENCIES.md to identify template-instance pairs.
notes: ESM. No shells_out. Reads docs/DOCUMENT_DEPENDENCIES.md (SoNash-specific). --fix flag deliberately unimplemented to prevent false confidence. Not portable: depends on SoNash document dependency system.

name: check-external-links
purpose: Validates external URLs in documentation via HTTP HEAD requests with rate limiting (100ms/domain), result caching, timeout (10s), and JSONL output.
notes: ESM. No shells_out (uses node HTTP natively). No SoNash-specific paths. Portable.

name: check-hook-health
purpose: Checks hook health and session state: verifies all hooks are syntactically correct via node --check, checks cross-validation warnings in session state, reports usage statistics.
notes: CJS. Shells out to node --check for syntax validation of hooks. Reads .claude/hooks/ directory and .claude/hooks/.session-state.json. Path based on CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env var with path traversal guard. Used by session-begin/session-end workflows.

name: check-pattern-compliance
purpose: Scans code for documented anti-patterns from CODE_PATTERNS.md; learning reinforcement tool with severity tiers, false-positive tracking, verified-patterns config, and staged/all/verbose modes.
notes: ESM with createRequire. Shells out to git (execSync). ANTI_PATTERNS array dynamically read by analyze-learning-effectiveness.js via file path. Not portable: tied to SoNash CODE_PATTERNS.md and scripts/config/ system.

name: check-pattern-sync
purpose: Verifies consistency between CODE_PATTERNS.md, check-pattern-compliance.js, SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md, and security-helpers.js by extracting and comparing Pattern #N references.
notes: CJS. No shells_out. Hardcoded to SoNash-specific files: docs/agent_docs/CODE_PATTERNS.md, docs/agent_docs/SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md, docs/AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md. Not portable.

name: check-propagation-staged
purpose: Registry-based pre-commit gate that detects propagation misses: when staged diff matches a security/safety pattern registry entry, scans sibling files for missing pattern propagation.
notes: CJS. Shells out to git (execFileSync). Uses minimatch for glob matching. Reads scripts/config/propagation-patterns.json and known-propagation-baseline.json. The registry patterns themselves are SoNash-specific but the mechanism is portable. Sanitize: config paths and pattern content. v2.0 refactor 2026-03-30.
